title: spergula platensis var. platensis
intro: Spergula platensis var. platensis, also known as sea spurrey, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sea spurrey include its ability to support skin health, reduce inflammation, and act as an anti-oxidant, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Sea spurrey can be consumed as a herbal preparation, such as a tea or tincture, and is also used in some skincare products due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
